title: チューリップ賞の後に・幸先や良し

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Were you watching? Did you see how I sprinted
across the finish line in first place?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Of course! There's no way I'd let someone like
Vodka get the best of me!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
But I'm not letting up! I'm going to get first in the
next race as well!
choice_data_list: Even in the Oka Sho, huh?
Even in the Oka Sho, huh?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
The first hurdle of the Triple Tiara? Hmph! I'll leap
right over it!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
All right, no time to rest. This is just the beginning
of my career as number one!
